import unreal
walk = unreal.load_asset('/Game/Character/A_Walk')
opts = unreal.AnimPoseEvaluationOptions()
pose = unreal.AnimPoseExtensions.get_anim_pose_at_time(walk, 0.0, opts)
arr = unreal.Array(unreal.Name)
unreal.AnimPoseExtensions.get_bone_names(pose, arr)
names = [str(n) for n in arr]
print('NUM:', len(names))
print('BONES:', names)
